ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Standard of the size (e.g., US, EU, UK, Asia) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is applicable (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child, Baby) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Top, Dress, Pant, Outerwear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "chest_depth" REAL /* Chest depth measurement in cm */,
  "cuff_circumference" REAL /* Cuff circumference measurement in cm */,
  "neck_circumference" REAL /* Neck circumference measurement in cm */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Recommended weight range for the size (e.g., 50-60 kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category supports custom sizes */,
  "recommended_fit" TEXT /* Description of the recommended fit for the category (e.g., True to size, Runs small, Runs large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color(s) available for the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Description of the fit (e.g., True to size, Runs small, Runs large) */,
  "is_new" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is new */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is featured */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size is out of stock */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the size is expected to be restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size standard */,
  "standard_url" TEXT /* URL to more information about the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the custom size chart */,
  "chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the custom size chart image */,
  "chart_pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to the PDF version of the custom size chart */,
  "chart_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video explaining the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer service) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "chest_depth" REAL /* Chest depth measurement in cm */,
  "cuff_circumference" REAL /* Cuff circumference measurement in cm */,
  "neck_circumference" REAL /* Neck circumference measurement in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in kg */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the size recommendation (0-100) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size recommendation (e.g., Based on measurements, Based on historical purchases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., wrong size, wrong color) */,
  "return_reason_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the return reason */,
  "return_images" TEXT /* JSON array of URLs to images of the returned product */,
  "return_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video explaining the return reason */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the fit */,
  "fit_images" TEXT /* JSON array of URLs to images of the product on the customer */,
  "fit_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video showing the fit of the product */,
  "fit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fit feedback (e.g., True to size, Runs small, Runs large) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
